blockers.description: Real arena-map graphics/components — Cherlon supplying; current map is a placeholder SVG
Reconcile 'Virtual' tier: literal physical back section vs. remote stream-only (affects map + copy)
Real per-tier prices ($297/$497/$2,497 placeholders; Virtual $297 collides with the $297 RESS), checkout URL, booking/specialist URL, guarantee terms, Grant photo — all TBD

decisions.decision: RE Summit = light/airy palette (#EEF3F8 bg, navy text, cyan #0E97C7), Inter + Bodoni upright, no italics, no 'FREE'
10-minute hold lives on Page 2 checkout only (live timer); NO countdown on Page 1 opt-in (ROADMAP — avoid cannibalizing $297 RESS)
Expired hold is RE-STARTABLE by tapping a map section (resets 10:00, re-enables BUY, no redirect)
Remove the word 'Ticketmaster' from all client-facing page copy (reference only)
Checkout = single primary BUY CTA + tiny 'talk to a specialist' link; brand bar uses the GC white-knockout logo on navy

next_action: Build Page 3 confirmation as sketch 008 (plan in remaining_tasks id 5). Reuse the locked light/airy system + Cardone brand bar + ticket images. Verify desktop+mobile in Chrome (if DevTools profile locks: pkill -f 'chrome-devtools-mcp/chrome-profile'), publish artifact, commit, then offer to save to the CRO folder.
context_notes: Scratchpad has resized ticket webps (tkts-virtual/executive/vip.webp + tk-*.webp) for embedding into artifacts (claude.ai CSP blocks remote images). Sketches use remote URLs (work locally/GHL); artifact builds substitute data URIs. gsd-tools binary: node $HOME/.claude/gsd-core/bin/gsd-tools.cjs (no global gsd-sdk).
